CVE-2018-1056.title: An out-of-bounds heap buffer read flaw was found in the way advan ...
CVE-2018-1056.description: An out-of-bounds heap buffer read flaw was found in the way advancecomp before 2.1-2018/02 handled processing of ZIP files. An attacker could potentially use this flaw to crash the advzip utility by tricking it into processing crafted ZIP files.
